meta.title: VSON | About Our Company
meta.description: Learn about VSON's 20-year journey building Vietnam's phygital commerce ecosystem. Meet our leadership team: Frederick Dang, Henry Hung, Emily Vo, and Duy Le.

og.title: VSON | About Our Company
og.description: Learn about VSON's 20-year journey building Vietnam's phygital commerce ecosystem. Meet our leadership team.

page_hero.heading:
20 years.
One conviction.
page_hero.sub: From Vietnam's first distribution partnerships to a full-service phygital commerce ecosystem. This is how VSON was built.

paragraphs: VSON began with a question two founders kept asking themselves.

After years at FPT, one of Vietnam's largest technology and distribution corporations, Frederick Dang and Henry Hung had seen the market from the inside. They knew how products moved, where the gaps were, and why so many great brands never fully reached the consumers who needed them. So they left to build something different.

The first chapter was about trust. VSON started by bringing world-class consumer brands, carefully selected and rigorously sourced, into Vietnamese homes. Building that retail presence took patience, deep market knowledge, and a relentless focus on quality. Over time, it created something more valuable than a product catalogue: a distribution network, a loyal customer base, and a reputation that opened doors.
story.highlight: "Those open doors led to a second chapter."
paragraphs_after: Brands who trusted VSON to distribute their products began asking for more: how to activate campaigns, how to reach new audiences, how to grow. VSON answered with solutions: merchandise, activation campaigns, and the commercial intelligence to make them work. The B2B business grew from the same roots as the retail business: real market experience, not theory.

The next chapter is already underway. VSON is becoming the partner of choice for international companies, particularly those from Singapore, who see Vietnam's opportunity but need someone who truly knows the terrain. That confidence comes from the combined strengths of the founding team: deep operational experience, commercial instincts built across hundreds of brand partnerships, and the cross-border perspective needed to turn market ambition into market presence.
The name has always carried the vision. VSON: Việt Sing is a bridge. Between Vietnam and Singapore. Between world-class brands and the consumers who deserve them. Between ambition and execution.

leaders.name: Frederick Dang
leaders.title: Co-Founder
leaders.bio: Frederick built VSON from the ground up, from the first brand partnership to the ecosystem it is today. His focus has always been on the fundamentals: the right brands, the right structure, and the execution discipline to make growth stick.

leaders.name: Henry Hung
leaders.title: Co-Founder
leaders.bio: Henry is the commercial engine behind VSON's expansion. He built the relationships, opened the markets, and developed the partnerships that turned an early-stage business into a trusted name across Vietnamese commerce.

leaders.name: Emily Vo
leaders.title: Operations Director & Market Expansion Lead
leaders.bio: Emily keeps VSON running while simultaneously opening new doors. She brings together operational rigour and market instinct, ensuring that as VSON grows, the quality of execution never slips.

leaders.name: Duy Le
leaders.title: Operations Manager
leaders.bio: Duy is the person who makes the day-to-day work. From logistics to partner coordination, he holds the operational thread that connects VSON's commitments to its clients and customers.

cta_band.heading: Ready to explore what VSON can do for you?
cta_band.body: Whether you're a brand, a Singapore corporate, or a distribution partner, we're happy to start a conversation.
